quote.msg: 扮真阿？

replies.msg: 反熱就真阿咩

Don’t believe for a second that Mkhitaryan doesn’t want to play for Arsenal. More likely he doesn’t want to play full stop if it means taking less money than he’s on now & I’d be amazed if we’d offer him even close to 200k+ pw.

Our wage bill is the issue & we need to bring in a few & look to renew the likes of Ramsey & Wilshere who’ll want more. Big fees are fine, big wages not so much so he’d have to take a cut or be payed off in some way by Man Utd.

Explained: PL restrict total wage increase to £7m pa year on year so if for example we increased Alexis & Ozil to £280k pw, we’d go well beyond that (more than double). This is ok if you can justify it through increased com deals, matchday rev &/or player sales.

Our income would’ve gone down, with less matchday rev from cheaper tix & lower attendances, our com deals won’t increase from last year & we’ve also lost money dropping out of CL. So ultimately we’re reliant on selling players to allow us to spend despite being fairly cash rich.

We played safe by staying cash rich instead of investing big in players. The rule changes mean cash in the bank is worthless now whilst player values are going through the roof & our 2 most valuable assets are out of contract.

So we could afford to buy who we want but couldn’t add the wages to the bill without significant sales whilst Our competition can show the revenue increases to add 2 or 3 superstars in one window & we can’t extend with the ones we have.

Need to announce some big commercial deals in the next year or so & being back in the CL asap is absolutely vital.

【拆骨潮】除了山齊士、禾確特之外，韋碧克也遭到挖角？

目前，除了山齊士、奧斯爾與禾確特接近離隊之外，盛傳「韋大帝」韋碧克，如今也身陷轉會傳言當中，而這名英格蘭國腳的潛在下家，則是土超勁旅比錫達斯。

較早前，比錫達斯把隊內的主力射手杜辛，售到英超的愛華頓，所以他們有意於短期內，物色一名速度飛快、埋門質素不俗的射手補充，而效力於阿仙奴的韋碧克，則成為了他們的目標人物之一。

不過，土耳其媒體《Posta》認為，阿仙奴不會於今冬把韋碧克放售，畢竟山齊士如今接近轉投曼聯，而禾確特也有望成為愛華頓的新力軍，所以槍手的教練雲加，理應不會於季中，再把任何的鋒將送走。

http://www.posta.com.tr/fikret-orman-dan-londra-ya-transfer-seferi-haberi-1371402

quote.msg:
Don’t believe for a second that Mkhitaryan doesn’t want to play for Arsenal. More likely he doesn’t want to play full stop if it means taking less money than he’s on now & I’d be amazed if we’d offer him even close to 200k+ pw.

Our wage bill is the issue & we need to bring in a few & look to renew the likes of Ramsey & Wilshere who’ll want more. Big fees are fine, big wages not so much so he’d have to take a cut or be payed off in some way by Man Utd.

Explained: PL restrict total wage increase to £7m pa year on year so if for example we increased Alexis & Ozil to £280k pw, we’d go well beyond that (more than double). This is ok if you can justify it through increased com deals, matchday rev &/or player sales.

Our income would’ve gone down, with less matchday rev from cheaper tix & lower attendances, our com deals won’t increase from last year & we’ve also lost money dropping out of CL. So ultimately we’re reliant on selling players to allow us to spend despite being fairly cash rich.

We played safe by staying cash rich instead of investing big in players. The rule changes mean cash in the bank is worthless now whilst player values are going through the roof & our 2 most valuable assets are out of contract.

So we could afford to buy who we want but couldn’t add the wages to the bill without significant sales whilst Our competition can show the revenue increases to add 2 or 3 superstars in one window & we can’t extend with the ones we have.

Need to announce some big commercial deals in the next year or so & being back in the CL asap is absolutely vital.

Bobby Gardiner recently explored for the Ringer. Speaking about Raheem Sterling’s upturn in goalscoring form, Gardiner concluded:

“How can one of the top scorers in the Premier League this season be bad at shooting? The answer, in the end, is deceptively simple: Shooting ability matters less than we tend to think it does. As Raheem Sterling has illustrated, being a top goal scorer is less about taking the chances, and much more about getting them in the first place.”

Aubameyang’s finishing really is about the average you would expect – a number of chipped goals per season show he can be cool and there’s definitely a confidence in front of goal but he misses his fair share too. That hasn’t mattered in recent years because he gets so many brilliant chances that he makes up for those he misses.

【最新】曾志偉今午四點半舉行記者會

大陸網媒早前瘋傳「曾志偉性侵藍潔瑛」等經過剪輯之視頻，曾即發聲明，澄清與事件無關，並指該等不實視頻（信息）一經發佈，「引起眾多不明真相網友的相繼轉發及評論，曾志偉先生因此蒙受了來自各個方的嚴重質疑、誤解」，並要求刪除不實資訊，又表明將依法追究。

一波未平，日前（11號）大陸「超模教母」韓穎華（韓姨）突然喺微博出post，矛頭直指曾志偉，指其捲性侵案，更稱不只一次。

連日來韓姨不斷發功，含沙射影，不過一直未有人證物證提供。曾志偉連日來未有回應，其女兒曾寶儀（阿寶）已表明相信爸爸，但尚未查明的指控和誹謗，令她被謾罵「強姦犯女兒」，甚至有人詛咒「全家死光光」，曾寶儀昨日再強調：「我相信爸爸，以爸爸出來說明為主」，其經理人亦稱：「她不姑息任何形式的性騷擾和性侵，也不姑息未經證實的指控。」

今日下午四時半，曾志偉將於九龍香格里拉酒店舉行記者會。
